column1: 家族と共に、幸せな時間を過ごした。
column2: かぞくとともに、しあわせなじかんをすごした。
column3: I spent a happy time together with my family.
column4: と共に (together with / along with / as ~ progresses)
column5: Noun + と共に + Verb / Verb[dict] + と共に (as time/thing progresses, something else happens)
column6: ① doing together with someone/something; ② simultaneous change 'as X progresses, Y also changes'
column8: と共に = together/simultaneously (formal); と一緒に = together (casual); にしたがって = as/following (proportional change); とともに = same (alternate spelling)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:と共に source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k complexity:standard
